finding_results.notes: The corridor bargain now breaks its symmetry: Anya overruns her ask, Damian interrupts the rhythm, Anya corrects a mislanded line, and Damian's paper-trail stake speech lands against a deliberately underweighted reply.
Replaced the repeated fluorescent phrasing with varied institutional-light language. The chapter now uses strip/white/buzzing light descriptors instead of repeating 'fluorescent.'
The two earlier Damian jaw tells were replaced with mouth/eye movement and only the later jaw-tightening beat remains.
Kept the cheek-biting at the live slip point in the corridor and replaced the later repeat with a different stress reaction.
Audited hedge-word use and cut the chapter's 'something' count down to 3 retained instances.

The opening now states that Damian's forum note arrived the next morning, the event was scheduled for the following Thursday, there was no intervening contact, and the current scene is the same promised forum.

The late-chapter recap now focuses on the new paper trail created by the official note and outgoing log, plus the risk that Brandt/Gessler or WISE could connect Anna Kessler to Anya Forger from the wrong side first, instead of replaying the entire 'false report bought access' chain.

summary: Clarified the chapter-3-to-chapter-4 time handoff, roughened the corridor alliance negotiation into a messier and more mistrustful exchange, compressed the aftermath so the chapter closes on the new paper trail, and resolved the flagged repetition/gesture counts while aligning Damian's family-reference exposition with continuity.
